text.name: Number of pants and skirts produced
Number of dresses and suits produced
Number of goods for men produced
Number of Wheel of Fortune wins
Do you want to change clothes for {0} {1}?
You are in the process of completing an action and cannot change your clothes at this point!
The security guard prevents robbery in your store. You can hire him for 5 days and further extend this time.
If you get {0} extra friends your protection will extend by {1}.
Do you want to buy {0} tiles for {1}?
You need to choose a shape first to place the print on it!
Drag this item into your store to use it.
You have to reach level {0} to buy an additional cash desk. You may also drag an old cash desk from your store over here to buy a new one.
You have to reach level {0} to buy an additional dressing room. You may also drag an old dressing room from your store over here in order to buy a new one.
You have to reach level {0} to buy an additional shelf. You may also drag an old shelf from your store over here in order to buy a new one.
You have to reach level {0} to buy an additional worker. You may also drag an old worker from your store over here in order to buy a new one.
You have to reach level {0} to buy an additional mannequin. You may also drag an old mannequin from your store over here in order to buy a new one.
You can't buy more cash desks for now!
You can't buy more dressing rooms for now!
You can't buy more shelves for now!
There are no new expansions available yet.
You can't buy more workers for now!
You can't buy more mannequins for now!
Do you really want to sell this item for {0} per item?
You can't remove an unsatisfied worker from your store. Pay a bonus salary or sell him/her.
You can't store the mannequin as long as it is still wearing clothes.
You have to complete this action first before you can renovate your store!
Choose a worker to produce goods.
The worker is already busy. Choose another one!
You can only produce certain things with this worker. \nChoose a product from the {0} collection.
Do you want to add {0} as friend?
You still have goods in your hands. Put them on a shelf before you place gifts.
Do you want to 'Finish now'? Still {0} times possible!
Your invitation to {0} has been sent!
The shelf is not accessible. Reorganize a little.
This worker is not accessible. Please reorganize a little.
Do you want to change your mannequin?
The store was closed by the owner.
You can't switch to the renovation mode as long as there are other players working in your store.
Other players are still in your store. Would you like to kick them out so you may switch to redecoration mode?
Type in your e-mail address and we will send you a new password.
You don't have appropriate goods on the shelves to dress this mannequin.
The player has left the arcades.
1. Select a tile 2. Click on your shop floor, hold the mouse button and select the area you want to change. 3. Let go of the mouse button.
You need to register before you can shop in here
You first have to register in order to be able to promote your store.
You need to register to change your look!
Only registered users can change their password!
You need to register first to participate in a Co-Op!
You need to register first to send gifts.
You need to register before you can invite other friends.
The server gets restarted, you can go on soon. Please log out.
Do you really want to fire your cashier?\nIf you haven't got enough cashiers the customers will wait longer and get displeased.
Do you want to hire a new cashier?
Please refresh the page to load the newest version.
Some nice basics for a picnic!
Beautiful evening gowns for your prom night!
Perfect outfit for a sports tour!
People and music all night long!
The perfect gift for every occasion!
There is nothing quite like a well-fitting suit!
Skirts, tops and shoes...everything in red!
Gowns, gowns, gowns for our gals!
Your promotion is over! Take a look at the results! How is the next promotion going to turn out?
The promotion is going on right now. You can see here how it is going.
Every customer buys twice as much!
Every customer that shops with you gets you XP!
That name is already taken. How about:
Now you can place a new cash desk and a new cashier in your store!
A new dressing room was unlocked.
You can buy an additional shelf!
You have expanded and got more space now for your customers, decorations and much more!
Now you can add another worker to your store to produce more goods.
Did you know? You can expand your shop to get more space for customers and new goods.
Did you know? You can promote your store to make it even more popular, buy more merchandise or earn extra XP.
Congratulations! You have reached a new level.
This happened in your shop while you were gone:

You can do jobs together with your friends and earn extra XP and Fashiondollars.
The faster you are the higher your reward!

If you are running out of time just extend it!

Remember though, you will only receive the reward if you make a contribution!
How often would you like to produce {0} for this Co-Op?
Do you really want to leave this Co-Op?
No active Co-Ops at the moment.\nStart a new one!
The following goods are on this shelf.
Do you want add {0} permanently to your catalogue for {1} Gold Buttons?

You can create and produce your own cloths here! Choose shape and color! The shape defines the production time and your earnings. The pattern will then be available for 24 hours. If you want to keep the pattern you can add it permanently to your your catalogue!

If you move your furniture or decorations to this tab and NOT to the cash register, they will be put in storage. If you drag them back to the store, this will cost you no money. You can see the item number for each item next to the empty box.
The furniture and decorations have a luxury value, which, when added up, make up the luxury value of your store! How luxurious is your store?
Do you want to 'Finish now'? You can do that {0} more times today.
There are no new patterns available yet.
Here you can find your own custom patterns!

You need patterns to produce goods.
Buy some from the catalogue.
Use advertising to make your store buzz!
Find new friends at the arcades!
Start a Co-Op together with your friends!
Design your own patterns from now on!
New decorations have been activated for you!
Attention! From now on goods can be stolen! It's best to hire a policeman!
Visit other players via the ranking!
Try your luck at the Wheel of Fortune and win great prizes!
You can send one gift per day to each of your friends.
Your gift box is empty. Send some gifts to your friends, maybe they will send you some in return.
The seamstress produces nothing but clothes.
Type in the name and e-mail address of your friend to invite him/her.
You must fill out every textbox.

Someone left a purse at the lost property office!
Maybe it belongs to one of your friends?
The head of security is looking for a job for his intern! Maybe your friends will hire him!
Your cashier found a box with extra clothes!\nShare them with your friends!
You don't have anything in this category to choose from.
Use a variety of clothes and combine as many parts as possible on your mannequins to impress your customers!
Share some extra goods with your friends!
Every label you earn makes your goods better!
Another player was faster than you!
You produced {0} perfectly today!\nGive your friends the produced excess!
Your welcome present of {0} Gold Buttons has been added to your account.
{0} Gold Buttons are awaiting you as a welcome-back present. Click on the link in the welcome e-mail in order to collect them.
You can have the e-mail sent again.
As a welcome-back gift you receive {0} Gold Buttons and a cool booster!
As a Welcome-Back gift you receive {0} Gold Buttons and the security guard for {1}!
The intern has started to work and extended the time of your security guard for 1 hour!
Your reward is in your gift box!
Accept Terms and Conditions of Use
After you have registered, you will receive {0} Gold Buttons as a welcome present via mail.
All of your goods were stolen.
Some of your goods were robbed.
Present the produced goods on a shelf or hire a security guard to avoid getting robbed.
Click on a shelf using the sale sign to mark the clothes for sale. The prices will get reduced and your store's popularity goes up. The sale ends as soon the shelf is empty.

We have just sent you your welcome present.
In order to collect it, simply click on the link in the welcome e-mail.
Spin the Wheel of Fortune and win awesome prizes!
Off to the Wheel of Fortune!
Already spun the Wheel of Fortune today?
The first spin is for free!
You don't have enough gold buttons to spin the Wheel of Fortune!
Only registered players can spin the Wheel of Fortune!
There's not enough space in your gift box for all your prizes! Make some room, then you can spin the Wheel of Fortune!
Congratulations! We have already awarded you your prize!
Congratulations! You can find your prize in the gift box.
Congratulations! You can find your prize in the gift box.
You have to reach at least level {0} in order to be able to take part in a promotion.
You don't have enough Gold Buttons/ Fashiondollars to take part in this promotion!
This user already has a character.
Your username must not be empty or contain special characters.
The shelf is not accessible! Please reorganize some items.
Your new password must have more than 2 characters. The old password needs to be entered correctly.
Your chat function has temporarily been deactivated by the administrator!
You need a higher level to join this Co-Op.\You need to unlock at least one required pattern to join.
The max. number of participants for this Co-Op has been reached.
You already started a Co-Op today! You can start another one tomorrow!
You don't have enough Gold Buttons to extend this Co-Op.
You don't have enough Gold Buttons to buy this pattern!
You don't have enough Fashiondollars to produce this pattern!
You don't have enough Fashiondollars or Gold Buttons to unlock this item!
You don't have enough Gold Buttons to change your avatar.
You are not allowed to use {0}!
-DEBUG: Your goods haven't been produced just yet
You can't get to this worker. Regorganize the items in your store so you can access him at least from one side.
Unfortunately, there is no shelf available to present your goods.
-DEBUG: Your goods haven't been produced just yet-
This shelf is not accessible. Regorganize the items in your store so that you can reach at least one side of the shelf.
This shelf is full. Choose another one to present the goods.
You can't hang up these goods. Choose a shelf where you can put it down.
-DEBUG: The item is not in stock-
-DEBUG: There are still goods on this shelf-
-DEBUG: You can't buy this expansion yet-
You can't sell the mannequin as long as it is still wearing clothes.
You need at least one cash desk so that the customers can pay for the goods.
You need at least one dressing room so that your customers can try on the goods.
You need at least one shelf to present your goods.
You need at least one worker to produce new goods.
You need at least one mannequin so that you can present your goods even better.
There are still clothes on this shelf!
You need a door! To change the door drag another one into your shop first.
We weren't able to load your store. Please get in touch with the Goodgame Studios support.
You have blocked the receipt of e-mails. Please contact the support
The full screen mode is not possible.
There is no space on this shelf for the gift.
You have reached your gift limit. Would you like to use {0} more for {1} Gold Buttons?
There is no space on this shelf for the gift.
You do not have enough Gold Buttons in order to use more presents!
You don't have enough Gold Buttons to change the style of your mannequin right now.
You can dress your mannequins early only a certain number of times. Tomorrow you can redecorate them again.
You don't have enough Gold Buttons to finish production now.
This player is not online right now. Please try again later!
Your friend is already registered at Fashion!
You have reached your limit of possible friends!
The player can't have any more friends!
Knocking-off time! You worked enough for now.
This store is full. Please try again later.
This User is already signed in.
This User is already signed in.
Your avatar is flawed. Please contact support.
You have blocked the receipt of e-mails. Click on ok to allow the receipt of e-mails.
There is no user registered at this adress!
You have to reach level 3 to visit the Arcade.
-DEBUG: You are already at the arcades-
If you want to produce something choose the shape first!
Sorry, you can't afford that yet.
You're out of money?\Register and you will earn {0} Fashiondollars!
You don't have enough Gold Buttons to hire a new cashier.
You can't afford the new pattern.
You don't have enough Gold Buttons to hire the security guard.
The e-mail address you entered is not valid.
There is already a user registered with this adress!
The e-mail adress you have typed in is not correct!
Your e-mail address is too long.
You have already confirmed your e-mail address.
You have to read and accept the terms and conditions of use first! Confirm by clicking the button on the left. Done!
The e-mail address must not be empty or contain special characters.
Your password must not be empty or contain special characters.
You don't have enough Fashiondollars to pay the bonus salary.
There are no goods on this shelf!
-DEBUG: You don`t own the pattern for this product -
The way to the worker is blocked. Try redecorating.
-DEBUG: Product type and worker type are not compatible-
- DEBUG: Incorrect booster for this worker -
Your pattern is not available anymore. Create a new one!
You don't have enough Fashiondollars to start production.

It's time!
Goodgame Fashion official beta is here! Everybody will start again from level 1 but gets the previously purchased Gold Buttons and additional 10 Gold Buttons back.
Please enjoy Goodgame Fashion!
Summer is here! The new GeeDee Collection has arrived!
Seek gold together with your friends!\nDiscover the new Co-Ops!
Discover the new shelves, dressing rooms and cash desks!
It has been never so easy to change your look! Just click on your character!
Spring is coming! Check out the new patterns and bring new life to your shop!
The new labels will make your goods even more profitable!
Colors everywhere! Check out the new JayJay Collection!
Discover the new shelves, dressing rooms and cash desks!
The new spring jackets are awesome!
New jobs await you! Help your friends and get rewarded!
Bring on the colors! The new JayJay Collection is now available for your shop!
Discover the new racks, changing cabins and cash registers!
The new Spring Jackets are here to rock your store!
Help your friends out and get rewarded!
Become a fashion designer and create your own patterns!
Discover the new display windows for your shop!
How lucky are you? Spin the Wheel of Fortune and find out!
Make your store more popular and glamorous through the new luxury value of furniture and decorational items!
Enthuse your customers with new shelves, dressing rooms and cash registers!
Promote your store in order to gain more popularity and earn extra XP!
Place more presents on your shelves!
I just installed Goodgame Fashion. Would you also like to open your own fashion store and become a fashion designer? Come and have a look!

Open up your own fashion store with Goodgame Fashion. Become a fashion designer, buy hot fabrics and produce your own apparel. Grow with your store’s popularity and make your store the hottest place for fashion in town.

Design your own swim wear and win! Goldbuttons are awaiting the winner and the pattern will appear in the pattern area!
Off to the forum and enter the competition!
Only registered players starting at level 1 are allowed to use the chat!
You don't have any friends yet.

Hi %s!

I've just discovered this great online game "Goodgame Fashion".

With this link you will get directly to the game:
http://www.goodgamestudios.com/fashion/

Register with this link to create your own Fashionshop for free at "Goodgame Fashion".

Find out what it's like to have your own Fashionshop. Produce wonderful clothes, accessories and shoes, sell them in your store and decorate it just as you wish!

Have fun, yours %s

Hello %s!

You've received this automatic e-mail because you requested a new password.
Your new password is: %s

You can login via this page:
http://www.goodgamestudios.com/fashion/

Please contact support@goodgamestudios.com if you have further questions or problems.

Have fun!

Your team at
Goodgamestudios.com

Hello,

thank you for your registration and welcome at "Goodgame Fashion".

You can log in all the time with the following data:
E-mail: %s
Password: %s

This link will take you directly to the game:
http://www.goodgamestudios.com/fashion/

Please contact support@goodgamestudios.com if you have any questions or problems.

Have fun!

Your team at
Goodgamestudios.com
The server gets restarted. We will be back in a minute.\nPress F5 to refresh the site.
from level {0} onwards you can advertise
Promotion ongoing Click for preliminary results
still {0} until label level {1} Click for more details
Remember to have clothes for girls and boys in your store at all times!
Coffee\n Increases the efficiency of your Seamstress by 20%!
Energy drink The efficiency of your shoemaker soars up by 20%!
Protein Shake It increases the efficiency of your goldsmith up to 20%!
Donate goods completely and free of charge
You still need {0} friends\nto unlock this expansion
You still need {0} friends\nto unlock this pattern

This is the catalogue, here you can buy new patterns. After buying a pattern you can use it unlimited times to produce goods. Click to buy a new pattern. And remember to have clothes for both men and women in your shop!
Your goods will become eye-catchers if you use them to dress up your mannequins. Click on a mannequin that's not currently in use.
... and then put it on a empty shelf!
The seamstresses produce clothes, later on you will be able to hire additional workers to produce other goods. Click on the Seamstress.
Click on the button and your clothes will be ready immediately.

Great! You have just completed the first steps to get your label out there, the first customers are pouring in! Explore the rest of our fashion world by yourself. There's more to discover. \n\nHave fun!
Excited to see the reactions of your customers? Click on Accept to see the ratings you got.
Depending on the kind of mannequin you want to dress you can only use certain clothing. You can dress a torso only with tops. Click on the clothes icon to see a selection.
This looks great! Click on the close button to go back to your shop.
You're selling only blue polo shirts. Please click on the mannequin to dress it.
You have bought the pattern. Switch back to the Production Book to see the goods you can produce.
Now click on the seamstress to give her instuctions for the production.
With Gold Buttons you can finish goods immediately. To finish them now please click on the seamstress.
Now you can start with the production.
You need to put your clothes on the shelves in order for customers to buy them. Please click on a worker with produced goods...
Welcome to your store, {0}! This quick tutorial will help you to find your way into the world of fashion.
The connection to the server failed. Please try to reconnect.

We are currently performing maintenance work, which is necessary from time to time. In order to bring in updates or new features or in order to correct mistakes.

We are working as fast as we can so you will be able to play again as soon as possible.
Why don't you try one of our other games in the meantime?
You have successfully logged out. Do not forget: Every day there is a login bonus for you!
An e-mail address from this supplier is not allowed!
Your internet connection seems to be quite slow at the moment. Please try again later!
How do you like the game and what can we improve upon? Please, let us know your opinion in our Goodgame forums or group.
Attention: Your progress is only saved when you register!
The e-mail address you entered is not correct.
You cannot use the chat function due to being blocked.
You need to register and reach level 1 to use the chat.
Do you want to add {0} as a friend?
The name you chose is not allowed!
In order to invite friends you need to register first.
Your account has been blocked! Please contact customer support!

Your account has been frozen permanently.
If you have any questions about this blockage, please contact support.
Enter your e-mail address and we will send you your password.
Register to save your game score!
The game will be available again in {0} at the latest.
The game server will shut down in {0}. Please log out or sign up to back up your score.
We are shutting the gaming server down in {0} due to maintenance work.
The game server is now shutting down. In a few minutes, you can log in again.
Nice to see you again! Here's a little something to help you get back on track!
Your new password was sent to your e-mail address.
Sorry, but this is not your old password.
Your password has been changed susessfully!
Your new password must have more than 2 letters and your old one must be entered correctly!
Your password must not be empty or contain special characters.
You can change your password only as a registered user!
More gold in the first 48 hours
Only 48 hours after your registration - Buy selected gold packages and get {0}% extra Gold for free!
Only 48 hours after your registration - Buy gold packages and get {0}% extra Gold for free!
Only 48 hours after your registration - Buy {0} packages and get {1}% extra for free!
Only 48 hours after your registration - Buy selected {0} packages and get {1}% extra for free!
You are being transferred to the payment shop.
Buy gold now and get a {0}% bonus!
Buy now {0} and get a {1} % bonus!
Get now {0}% more {1} for your money!
Starting immediately! Permanently reduced prices in our payment shop! Save real money!
Search for a tunnel through cyber space
You have to read and accept the terms and conditions first! Confirm by pressing the button on the left and off you go!
Read Terms and Conditions of Use
This user already has an avatar.
You are not allowed to use {0} in your name.
Accept Terms and Conditions of Use
Unfortunately, your e-mail address is too long.
The e-mail address you entered is incorrect.
Your e-mail address must not be empty or contain special characters.
Another player is registered with this e-mail address, sorry.
The name you entered is invalid.
The password you entered is too short. It has to be at least 4 letters long.
The password you entered is incorrect.
Your password must not be empty or contain special characters.
Watch your manner of expression, please. Otherwise you will get blocked from the chat or your account will be temporarily closed. Reason: {0}
You cannot use the chat function for the next {0} due to repeated misconduct. Reason: {1}
Don't write any URLs in the chat!
Several players have complained about you. You are being blocked from the chat for the next {0}. Reason: {1}
Do you really want to report the player {0}? Attention! Abuse of this function may result in your account being blocked.
You were reported to the administrator by another player. Reason: {0}
